title: Textron: Business Jet Market Tailwind To Drive Long-Term Value Creation
text: Strong fractional and charter demand should be a long-term growth catalyst for OEMs targeting the private aviation end-market. A shift in consumer preference away from commercial flights due to post-pandemic scheduling issues could further accelerate the expansion of private aviation.

title: Arctic Cat chooses Garmin Tread navigators for side-by-side vehicle integration
text: OLATHE, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Garmin International, Inc., a unit of Garmin Ltd. (NYSE: GRMN) today announced that Arctic Cat®, Inc., a Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) company, one of the most respected names in powersports, has selected Garmin to exclusively outfit its new Wildcat™ XX Black Hills Edition side-by-side vehicles with customized 5.5-inch Tread® navigators beginning in model year 2023. “We're honored that Arctic Cat has selected Garmin as standard equipment on its Wildcat XX Black Hills E

title: Textron (TXT) Unit Wins Deal to Support T-6C Aircraft Program
text: Textron (TXT) is going to supply three T-6C aircraft along with providing ground support equipment, two spare engines, spare parts and personal life support equipment.

title: Here's A Better Pick Over Textron Stock In The Aerospace & Defense Industry
text: We think that Lockheed Martin stock (NYSE: LMT) is currently a better pick than Textron stock (NYSE: TXT) despite being the more expensive of the two, trading at 1.8x trailing revenues compared to 1.1x for Textron.

title: Kautex Textron GmbH & Co. KG Receives AutomotiveINNOVATIONS Award
text: BONN, Germany--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Kautex Clear Vision Systems receives prestigious AutomotiveINNOVATIONS Award for its advancement in autonomous drive sensor cleaning technologies

title: Bell/Textron Says Keeping Future Vertical Lift On Track Is Critical To Renewing The Rotorcraft Industrial Base
text: Bell says the issue shouldn't be where the job are, but whether the Army and industry stay on the cutting edge of innovation.
